tagline: Resist the flame. Preserve your peace.
liner: This atmospheric ballad weaves warm F# major synth pads with melancholic acoustic guitar and deep 808 bass to craft a cinematic soundscape supporting emotive vocals about resisting destructive passion. The narrator sets firm boundaries against volatile love cycles, choosing self-preservation over toxic dependency. Intimate and breathy, the track guides you through a journey of emotional burnout toward gentle acceptance of leaving for peace. It is a resolute refusal to become another's fuel in the long night.
worldCaption: A cinematic soundscape where warm F# major synths meet melancholic guitar over deep 808 bass, painting a quiet world of resisting destructiv

bios.lead: Cuts through the haze with intimate resolve.
bios.back: Weaves harmony to soften the storm's edge.
bios.drums: Keeps time steady beneath emotional tremors.
bios.perc: Adds subtle texture without overwhelming silence.
bios.bass: Anchors the track in deep, resolute lows.
bios.synth: Paints warm atmospheric pads for contemplation.
bios.other: Layers ambient depth around vocal whispers.
bios.guitar: Plays soft acoustic lines with gentle regret.
bios.keys: Adds cinematic resonance to every bridge.
